workflow.critical: The workflow execution engine is governed by: ~/.nakiros/core/tasks/workflow.xml
You MUST have already loaded and processed: {installed_path}/workflow.yaml
YOU MUST ALWAYS SPEAK OUTPUT in the configured communication_language.
Execute ALL steps in exact order; do NOT skip steps.

step.action: Load profile config from {profile_config} when available (optional).

step.goal: Discover workspace scope via Nakiros MCP
step.action: Call Nakiros MCP tool `workspace_info` to get workspace metadata (id, name, pmTool, projectKey, topology, repoCount).
Extract workspace name, topology, and repoCount. Set {{is_multi_repo}} = (topology == "multi" OR repoCount > 1).
Call Nakiros MCP tool `workspace_repos` to get all repos (name, role, localPath, profile, llmDocs). Store as {{workspace_repos}}.
Set {{is_multi_repo}} = false. Single-repo scope using {project-root}. Do not assume any global workspace context.
Run: git log --oneline -10 → capture last 10 commits as {{recent_commits}}.
Run: git status --short → capture unstaged/staged changes as {{git_status}}.
For each repo in {{workspace_repos}}, capture current branch and git status if accessible.

step.goal: Load existing context via Nakiros MCP
step.critical: All workspace and repo context is stored in the Nakiros MCP server — do NOT read from local filesystem `_nakiros/` directories.

check.action: For each repo in {{workspace_repos}}: - Call Nakiros MCP tool `repo_context_get({repo.name})` - Extract available fields: architecture, stack, conventions, api, llms, updatedAt - Append to {{repo_contexts}} map keyed by repo name - Note which fields are populated and their updatedAt for freshness assessment

Call Nakiros MCP tool `repo_context_get({workspace_repos[0].name})` → extract architecture, stack, conventions, api, llms into {{arch_context}}, {{stack_context}}, {{conventions_context}}, {{api_context}}, {{llms_context}}

step.action: Note which context fields are populated and their freshness (updatedAt when present).
step.output: [CONTEXT] ✓ Existing context: {{list of populated fields per repo, or "none"}}

check.if: a ticket ID was provided by the user or calling workflow
check.action: Fetch ticket details via configured PM MCP connector: {{ticketId}}.
Capture: title, description, acceptance criteria, status, labels, assignee as {{ticket_context}}.
Log warning: "⚠ Could not fetch ticket {{ticketId}}. Continuing without ticket context."
